skills.name: crawl_page
skills.description: Crawls a web page and returns its HTML content. Use this skill when you need to fetch the raw HTML of a URL for further processing, analysis, or extraction.

skills.name: discover_urls
skills.description: Discovers and extracts all URLs from a web page or HTML content. Use this skill to find links for crawling, build site maps, or discover related pages.

skills.name: extract_structured_data
skills.description: Extracts structured data from HTML using CSS selectors or JSON-LD/schema.org markup. Use this skill to scrape product info, article metadata, or tables.

skills.name: octoparse_create_task_from_template

skills.name: render_page
skills.description: Renders a web page using a headless browser and returns the final DOM/HTML after JavaScript execution. Use for SPAs and dynamic content.
